mission: Build a modular WNBA betting intelligence platform with schedule, odds, stats, projections, risk, CLV, retraining, explainability, and dashboard layers.

modules.name: Source Registry
modules.purpose: Track every primary, fallback, and backup data source with reliability.

modules.name: Schedule Core
modules.purpose: Use the official daily slate as the game source of truth.

modules.name: Odds Source Manager
modules.purpose: Prefer no-credit/manual/sportsbook-derived odds before The Odds API backup.

modules.name: Sportsbook Consensus
modules.purpose: Normalize multi-book lines and best over/under prices.

modules.name: Player Stats Warehouse
modules.purpose: Maintain player averages, form, minutes, and recent stat context.

modules.name: Boxscore Fallback
modules.purpose: Recover player stat data when official endpoint fails.

modules.name: Play-by-Play Layer
modules.purpose: Prepare possession, pace, lineup, and event-level inputs.

modules.name: Matchup Intelligence
modules.purpose: Add pace, defense, rest, home/away, and matchup adjustments.

modules.name: Projection Engine
modules.purpose: Blend last 5, last 10, season, matchup, usage, and market inputs.

modules.name: Player Props Model
modules.purpose: Generate prop projection, side, edge, sportsbook, and history display.

modules.name: Spread Model
modules.purpose: Project game margin, spread edge, side selection, and cover probability without inventing edge when upstream projections are unavailable.

modules.name: Totals Model
modules.purpose: Project game total, over/under edge, selection, and probability without inventing edge when upstream projections are unavailable.

modules.name: Expected Value Engine
modules.purpose: Convert projection edges and prices into expected value decisions with final eligibility and guardrail separation.

modules.name: Portfolio Optimizer
modules.purpose: Build a diversified card with player, game, Kelly, card-size, and daily-exposure limits, including valid pass days.

modules.name: Risk Allocation
modules.purpose: Assign capped stakes, bankroll exposure, units, and team exposure buckets.

modules.name: CLV Tracker
modules.purpose: Track opening, current, and closing line value.

modules.name: Results Grading
modules.purpose: Grade picks after final scores and player results are available.

modules.name: Self Learning
modules.purpose: Adjust weights from outcomes, CLV, and error patterns.

modules.name: Model Explainability
modules.purpose: Explain why a pick exists and which factors mattered.

modules.name: Dashboard V4
modules.purpose: Display clean games, props, books, best bets, portfolio, AI, and health views.

modules.name: Model Calibration
modules.purpose: Compare predicted probability buckets to actual hit rates.

modules.name: Feature Importance
modules.purpose: Track which features help predictions and which create noise.

modules.name: Hyperparameter Optimization
modules.purpose: Tune model weights with optuna when enough historical results exist.

modules.name: Daily Retraining
modules.purpose: Automate daily model refresh, validation, and safe weight updates.

modules.name: Ensemble Learning
modules.purpose: Combine rules, market, projection, simulation, and self-learning scores.
